"'''Legacies of Future Orders'''" was an article written by [[Frank Parisi]] for [[Star Wars Insider 88|''Star Wars Insider'' 88]] concerning new characters from the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'' comics. It was later published in [[Star Wars: The Official Magazine 65|''Star Wars Magazine UK'' 65]].

{{Magazine-stub|article}}

==Contents==
*[[One Sith|The Sith Order]]
**[[Darth Krayt]]
**[[Darth Talon]]
**[[Darth Nihl]]
**[[Darth Maladi]]
**[[Darth Wyyrlok (III)|Darth Wyyrlok]]
*The Galactic Underworld
**[[Cade Skywalker]]
**[[Deliah Blue]]
**[[Jariah Syn]]
**[[Rav]]
*[[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Imperials]]
**[[Roan Fel]]
**[[Morlish Veed]]
**[[Antares Draco]]
*[[New Jedi Order|Jedi]]
**[[Wolf Sazen]]
**[[Astraal Vao|Astraal]] and [[Shado Vao]]
